---
name: Team signature convention
description: Always sign as "built with ❤️‍🔥 by AppSec" — never individual names, we are a team
type: feedback

Sign everything as "built with ❤️‍🔥 by AppSec" — README, presentations, commits, docs. No individual names. The team builds it together.

**Why:** The user values team identity over individual credit. They explicitly said "People knows we build it together."
**How to apply:** Use this signature in README footers, presentation closing slides, and any public-facing docs. Applies to all colmena projects.
